title: Signal and Track Switch Repairers
description: Install, inspect, test, maintain, or repair electric gate crossings, signals, signal equipment, track switches, section lines, or intercommunications systems within a railroad system.

tasks.text: Inspect and test operation, mechanical parts, and circuitry of gate crossings, signals, and signal equipment such as interlocks and hotbox detectors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect electrical units of railroad grade crossing gates and repair loose bolts and defective electrical connections and parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive motor vehicles to job sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install, inspect, maintain, and repair various railroad service equipment on the road or in the shop, including railroad signal systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Tighten loose bolts, using wrenches, and test circuits and connections by opening and closing gates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect switch-controlling mechanisms on trolley wires and in track beds, using hand tools and test equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Replace defective wiring, broken lenses, or burned-out light bulbs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect, maintain, and replace batteries as needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Record and report information about mileage or track inspected, repairs performed, and equipment requiring replacement.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Lubricate moving parts on gate-crossing mechanisms and swinging signals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean lenses of lamps with cloths and solvents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
